description_long: This house features a modern, open-plan layout with a combination of flat and gently sloped roof sections, and a mix of indoor and outdoor living spaces. The structure includes a prominent carport or covered patio area with a dark roof, adjacent to a smaller outbuilding or shed. The main building is characterized by large, rectangular windows and a spacious central courtyard or deck, which is partially enclosed by the house itself. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones with contrasting dark roof elements and some wooden accents. The property is set on a rectangular plot with clear zoning between living, utility, and recreational areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story house with a mix of flat and sloped roofs, large windows, and a spacious central courtyard. The exterior features light walls, dark roofing, and a prominent carport or patio area.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large windows, and the open courtyard area behind the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the carport or covered patio, the adjacent outbuilding, and the linear arrangement of rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the sloped roof section, the central courtyard, and the back of the carport structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the main living area, the carport, and the transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, minimal steps, and a covered overhang integrated into the facade
